user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new expense head, so that travel expenses can be categorized consistently.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Expense Head screen; When I click Add new expense head and provide the details; Then the new expense head is saved and shown in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view expense heads with their description and document, so that I can review the configured expense categories.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Expense Head screen; When the list loads; Then each expense head displays its Expense head, Description and Document columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the expense head list, so that I always see the latest saved records.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Expense Head screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the current expense heads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to attach a supporting document to an expense head, so that expense categories are backed by reference material.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing an expense head; When I upload a document; Then the document is stored and shown in the Document column

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next configuration step or cancel, so that I can control the travel setup workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Expense Head screen; When I click Next or Cancel; Then I advance to the next step or discard changes accordingly
